text.message: Don t let me get plowed twice
If blue settle we are done
okey black, im soloing u all game
u solo the guy in the worst position
and you didn't agree to a NB
its okey, just take the consequense of your play
the consequence is that I got a city
ye and i will solo u the entire game
red blue got the settle we're done
U are talking a lot for someone who didn’t win yet
Let see how u talk when u lose
the "thief" is in a good spot there is no need to use a knight
and orange doesn't have a knight
Why wouldn’t u use it blue ??
I could plow u red, but choosed not to do
orange I didn't give you permission to speak
what a cringe player u are
u have the best set up and u rob me the entire game
yes keep typing 0 on wheat NB
thank god you typed 0 I noticed you had a wheat after you typed 0 :DDD
Blue what do u need to take roads ?
guys it's over I already won
well gl winning, ill give blue the win
just pass the dice and let me finish you
Can t take it this round
haha you're admitting to gamethrowing that's a bannable offense :DDD
I can trade roads and u can dev for army
you just admitted to being a cheater :DD
not cheating to help out the guy in 2nd
cant get it from u mr small peepee
guys I'm playing 1v3 and still winning come on do better :DDD
you should win this game you're playing 1v3 if you lose this you must never play catan again
imagine gamethrowing 1v3 and still losing that would be embarassing :DDD
Ure the only embarrassing thing dude
red blue got the settle that you wanted we're done bro :DDD
It s not about winning but respecting the other players
who cry when I rob them
and say "I'll solo you all game" after I rob them for a resource I need :DDD
Winning 1 game wont earn u a dignity
and then they say "I'll give all my cards to the other play just so you don't win"
No dignity is needed here I'm here to have fun
The worst thing is that I'll see you guys again the next time I play this game that's all XDDD
Yeah obviously u lost any dignity a long time ago
Give me all your cards guys
i might be able to plow him on the 10
Give blue all the cards that way it will be easier to get you banned when I report you to staff
Black when everyone tells u to sh*t up u do
blue nobody gave you permission to speak
I need help blue you're right
You need so much help blue
they didnt have the cards, but okey lil fella
You need so much help that two people are helping you from the beginning
giving you all the cards  you need :D
let's give him more cards guys why did you stop
wasn't red saying that we are done if blue gets the spot? and then he gives him all the cards :DDD
If you had a little bit of intelligence black you wouldn’t be in that situation
Black ure so stupid that u can’t understand it’s not about winning
in a situation where I am playing with you? XDDD
I agree playing with you is a terrible situation
It s terrible for everyone who plays with u obviously
guys let's give cards to blue
so that he gets a city and wins
that way I can 100% prove that you threw and I can ban you at last :D
I had so much fun this game xDDD
